misc.PremiumNotes_changed_how_I_organize_my_t: PremiumNotes changed how I organize my thoughts completely. The multi-language support is unmatched for my international team.
misc.The_dark_mode_aesthetic_combined_with_th: The dark mode aesthetic combined with the buttery smooth React UI makes writing a joy instead of a chore.

help.OfAllAvailableShortc: of all available shortcuts at any time, open the full Cheat Sheet by pressing:
help.clickTheNewNoteButto: Click the "New Note" button in the header or use the shortcut to instantly start capturing your thoughts.
help.organizeYourWorkflow: Organize your workflow efficiently by attaching color-coded tags to your notes. Filter by tags in the main view.
help.selectAnyTextWhileEd: Select any text while editing to apply bold, italic, or code styling.
help.expressYourselfVisua: Express yourself visually! Click the palette icon inside any note to open the drawing canvas. Use pens, highlighters, and erasers.
help.allYourUploadedImage: All your uploaded images and doodles are powered by Cloudinary, ensuring lightning-fast delivery and pristine quality.
help.extractTextFromYourU: Extract text from your uploaded images instantly (Coming Soon!).
help.masterYourWorkflowWi: Master your workflow with these essential commands. To see the
help.headOverToTheSetting: Head over to the Settings page to update your avatar, name, and personal details.
help.ourAppSupportsMultip: Our app supports multiple languages perfectly via i18next. Toggle between them effortlessly using the globe icon in the navigation.
help.switchBetweenOurPrem: Switch between our premium dark mode and light mode directly from the header.
help.comingSoonDesc: Pro features are currently under development. We are working hard to bring you advanced capabilities and premium tools in future updates. Stay tuned!

shortcuts.mobileNote: Note: These shortcuts are designed for physical keyboards. Mobile users do not need to worry about them.
